CustomField.description: Monthly budget of Auto-approved hours for the discretionary short-circuit in DeliveryWorkApprovalService. Once the calendar month's sum of Auto-approved quoted hours reaches this cap, further under-threshold submissions fall back to the human approval queue. Blank (default) = no monthly cap (only the per-request threshold gates the Auto path).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Maximum total hours that may auto-approve per calendar month. Blank = unlimited (per-request threshold still applies).
CustomField.label: Discretionary Monthly Cap Hours
